B0.notes: All 5 P0 scenarios PASS. Seed succeeds with 13 results, correct IDs. APReportCard hook fix verified. B0-001 (pending grading undercount) FIXED via apTeacherService.js rewrite. See findings_B0.md.

B1.notes: LIVE Playwright re-run 2026-03-10. ALL 7 SCENARIOS PASS. DuplicateTabModal 32s suppression fix CONFIRMED WORKING. MCQ selection, flagging, strikethrough, navigator all verified interactively. B1-001 (bg-warning visibility) FIXED — bumped to amber-200. See findings_B1.md.

B2.notes: LIVE RE-RUN 2026-03-10. B2-001 (Submit Section called submitTest) CONFIRMED FIXED — FRQ Choice Screen appeared correctly. S-08 PASS, S-10 PASS, S-11 PASS, S-12 PARTIAL (nav shows Q0 of 7 — new B2-005), S-13 PARTIAL (frqMaxPoints=0 — new B2-006, frqAnswers stores all — B2-002 still open). 0 Blockers, 0 High, 4 Medium. See findings_B2.md.

B2-004 (Medium — MCQ_MULTI absent from seed data)

B3.notes: LIVE run 2026-03-10. S-14 PASS (MCQ table all 6 cols, 15 rows, MCQ Summary, Performance by Domain). S-15 FAIL — Flagged for Review section always empty (B3-001 High: flaggedQuestions never saved to result doc in createTestResult). S-16 PARTIAL — FRQ pending section correct but B3-002 (Medium: FRQ answers in wrong question order and wrong sub-question order). S-17 PASS (PDF button present, 0 errors, blob URL download). S-18 PASS (Back to Dashboard, Completed badge). 0 console errors. B3-003 (Medium: domain performance bar uses bg-success-text instead of bg-success). See findings_B3.md.
openFindings: B3-001 (High — flaggedQuestions not saved to result document, Flagged for Review section always empty)
B3-002 (Medium — FRQ submitted answers display wrong question mapping and wrong sub-question order)
B3-003 (Medium — Performance by Domain bars use wrong CSS token: bg-success-text instead of bg-success)

B4.notes: LIVE Playwright re-run 2026-03-10. Prior fixes B4-001 through B4-005 ALL CONFIRMED WORKING via live tests. S-19 PASS (review screen counts, FRQ choice screen, section lock). S-20 PASS (hamburger menu, ARIA, Escape, exit confirmation). S-21 PARTIAL — 3 new findings: B4-006 (Medium: student login redirects to vocaBoost / not /ap), B4-007 (High: answers+flags NOT restored after refresh — IndexedDB queue items never applied to UI on resume), B4-008 (Medium: timer shows stale value after resume, ~5s off due to 30s sync interval). See findings_B4.md.
openFindings: B4-006 (Medium — student@apboost.test redirects to / not /ap after login)
B4-007 (High — IndexedDB queue items not applied to UI state during reconcileQueue on resume)
B4-008 (Medium — timer correction not applied on resume, shows stale sectionTimeRemaining)

B5.notes: LIVE Playwright audit 2026-03-10. S-22/S-23 SKIP (no text stimulus in Calc seed data). S-24 PARTIAL: timer format/countdown PASS, but B5-001 (High) — text-warning-text/text-error-text resolve to text-text-primary (slate-900) — Tailwind v4 @theme naming mismatch affects 30+ files. S-25 PASS: lock icon, 'Locked' text, title attr, back-btn disabled all confirmed in Section 2. S-26 PASS (MCQ) / FAIL (FRQ): MathJax renders for MCQ, but FRQ vertical layout missing MathText wrapper (B5-002 High). See findings_B5.md.
openFindings: B5-001 (High — text-warning-text/text-error-text CSS tokens broken — Tailwind v4 @theme naming mismatch, affects 30+ components)
B5-002 (High — FRQ question text renders raw LaTeX in vertical layout — missing MathText wrapper in FRQQuestionDisplay.jsx line 221)
B5-003 (Medium — no text stimulus questions in seed data, annotation tools S-22/S-23 untestable)

B6.notes: LIVE Playwright run 2026-03-10. S-27 PARTIAL: Duplicate tab detection WORKS (BroadcastChannel fires) but modal appears on wrong tab — Tab 2 silently takes over, Tab 1 gets blocked. Spec requires Tab 2 to be blocked first (B6-001 High). S-28 PARTIAL: Disconnected banner PASS (45s/3 failures), Reconnected PASS (2s auto-dismiss), but Syncing banner imperceptible in practice — isFlushing too brief when queue is small (B6-004 Medium). S-29 PARTIAL: Report card loads, AP scores correct (5→green, 4→blue, 3→yellow, 2→light-red, 1→red), but 'Total: / pts' missing score values (B6-002 Medium: totalPossible vs maxScore field mismatch in seed) and 'Your Answer' shows — (B6-003 Medium: selectedAnswer vs studentAnswer mismatch in seed). E-05 PASS: beforeunload dialog fires correctly. 0 console errors outside expected offline failures. See findings_B6.md.
openFindings: B6-001 (High — duplicate tab modal appears on wrong tab; Tab 2 takes over without warning instead of being blocked)
B6-002 (Medium — seed result 'Total: / pts' missing numerator/denominator; totalPossible vs maxScore field name mismatch)
B6-003 (Medium — seed result MCQ 'Your Answer' column shows — for all questions; selectedAnswer vs studentAnswer field mismatch)
B6-004 (Medium — Syncing banner imperceptible in practice; isFlushing state duration too brief for small queues)
